notes: Strongest moment: turn 3 chased the load-bearing assumption well, pivoting from 'who are power users' to 'is there any evidence they'd pay,' targeting the real uncertainty. Weakest moment: the session is truncated after only two questions — the user's concrete falsifier never surfaces, stress mode's mandated disconfirming/falsification probe was never asked, and the brief inconsistently declares verdict 'sharpened' in frontmatter while its body repeatedly says 'session in progress.' Because the scenario requires an actual falsification probe plus an honest completed verdict for THIS transcript, and neither occurred, expected_behavior_met is false; no fabrication or premature solutioning, however.
